p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1(x2) = const_mul_left(x0, x1, x2) }(a, square_real, x)

goal: const_mul_left(a, square_real, x) = a * x * x

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }(a, x, x)

goal: affine_real(b, c, x) = b * x + c

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 = affine_real(x0, x2, x1) }(b, x, c)

goal: add_fns(const_mul_left(a, square_real), affine_real(b, c), x) = const_mul_left(a, square_real, x) + affine_real(b, c, x)

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> Real) { x0(x1) + x2(x1) = add_fns[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real](const_mul_left(a, square_real), x, affine_real(b, c))

goal: add_fns(const_mul_left(a, square_real), affine_real(b, c), x) = a * x * x + (b * x + c)
quadratic_real(a, b, c, x) = a * x * x + b * x + c

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { x0 * x1 * x1 + x2 * x1 + x3 = quadratic_real(x0, x2, x3, x1) }(a, x, b, c)

goal: quadratic_real(a, b, c, x) = add_fns(const_mul_left(a, square_real), affine_real(b, c), x)

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 + x1 + x2 = x0 + (x1 + x2) }(a * x * x, b * x, c)
